text.p: How is life over there? I do hope that you are acclamatising fast.I appreciate your constant contact with me especially through phone. It is a bit difficult for me to contact you on phone; so, I will still be using the e-mail avenue.
It is well with everybody at home here especially in the Department. Professor has taken over the headship of the Department, as Prof. has gone onleave. The Faculty Conference kicked off yesterday.
I saw your call for contribution for a book project; I will try to respond.So, thanks for the information.When will your family join you?
I will continue to keep you informed on the development here.

How is life over there? I am ikdeed very sorry for keeping so late to get across to you, in fact that very week you phoned me was the begining of my sickness to the extent that I couldn;t go to work throughout the week. I have just got over it. And have been so much borthered about not being able to respond to your messege. Please, sorry. The 's mumbers are these: and . And if none of the numbers gets through, you can try his wife's number which is; .
Greetings to your wife and children.
